title: Addis 517936 Large Rectangular 10 Litre Washing Up Bowl with Handles, Black, 39 x 32 x 14 cm
features: Large 9.5 litre capacity for everyday family use
With raised lifting handles for easy movement or pouring
Choice of 17 modern exciting trend colours
Made in the UK with 10 year Addis guarantee
Addis - part of the home since 1780
description: From the manufacturer Made For Life. Addis part of the home since 1780, based in UK. Addis has a 240+ year old history of design, manufacturing and supplying of housewares. The Addis brand still stands today - as it has for previous generations - for value and quality. 10L Capacity With a 10litre capacity this bowl is the perfect design for your washing up needs. You are able to fill it fairly deeply for a more thorough and roomy clean whilst you wash your dishes. Variety Of Colours This bowl comes in a variety of different colours so if you want something brighter then you can opt for a red or a pink. Handle Feature This black washing up bowl features a handle either side so that you can lift the bowl with ease and comfort.
